items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures mostly up with Fed decision, slew of Big Tech earnings on deck
items.description: US stock futures made gains with investors eyeing the upcoming Fed policy decision following another record-setting session on Wall Street.

items.title: New Record Closing Highs Ahead of Fed Cut, Mag 7 Earnings
items.description: Companies reporting earnings Wednesday include Alphabet, Meta, Microsoft, Boeing, Chipotle and Starbucks.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Ends At Record High; Nvidia Surges As Microsoft Hits Rare Milestone (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow and other major indexes closed at record highs on Tuesday. Microsoft joins an elite club of one.

items.title: Earnings live: Wayfair stock soars following Q3 results, PayPal rises, Royal Caribbean slides
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: US Equities Extend Record Run on Upbeat Earnings Ahead of Fed Decision
items.description: US equity benchmarks notched a third straight session of record highs on Tuesday amid upbeat earning
